name: optimization-detector
description: 二进制文件优化级别和LTO检测工具

scripts.setup: npm run setup:win --if-present || npm run setup:unix
scripts.build:onedir: ONEDIR_MODE=true bash build_exe.sh && npm run zip:onedir
scripts.lint: ./.venv/bin/tox -e ruff || .\.venv\Scripts\tox.exe -e ruff || python -m tox -e ruff || python3 -m tox -e ruff
scripts.lint:fix: ./.venv/bin/tox -e ruff-fix || .\.venv\Scripts\tox.exe -e ruff-fix || python -m tox -e ruff-fix || python3 -m tox -e ruff-fix

author: Huawei Device Co., Ltd.
